mechanism: Likely mediated in part by flavonoid/polyphenol antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity; Alkaloid constituents can modulate neuronal signaling pathways.
safetyNotes: May cause moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician, alcohol or or other cns depressants. Avoid combining with sedatives; Avoid in pregnancy; Avoid with sedative sensitivity; Avoid in liver disease.
